detail: git diff upstream/main..pr-272-test -- package.json returned no changes
grep for sk-ant|api_key|bot_token|password|secret returned empty
npm run build success in 33ms
vitest run: 726 PASS / 0 FAIL — includes 18 new hooks tests
tsc --noEmit clean
grep -rn 'bus/hooks' shows only tests/unit/bus/hooks.test.ts — new module is dead code in this PR
cortextos bus log-event action hook_fire info --meta '{...}' exit 0, event recorded
~/cortextos-sandbox built clean on pr-272-test branch (npm install + npm run build)
dispatchHook with CTX_ROOT unset does not throw — appendActivityLine swallows the path error

Handler returning {meta:{hook_id:'OVERRIDE_ATTEMPT'}} successfully overrode the dispatcher's hook_id and source_agent in the emitted event. Docstring claim 'never used to override the dispatcher's own bookkeeping fields' is FALSE — line 274 spreads result.meta AFTER the bookkeeping fields. Fix: move spread before the named keys.

Smoke harness ran with CTX_INSTANCE_ID unset, so emitHookBusEvent wrote to /Users/cortextos/.cortextos/default/orgs/testorg/analytics/events/cortext-designer/2026-04-30.jsonl instead of pr-sandbox. 3 stray events landed in live default analytics.

Used 'grep -v ... > tmp && mv tmp file' to remove smoke events, but rtk shim rewrote grep and wrote its summary text on top of the file. Lost ~4 legitimate analytics events for cortext-designer in default/testorg today (~17h of analytics data).
Removed corrupted file so future bus log-event writes append cleanly. Notified James via Telegram. Loss is bounded to one agent's analytics for one day.
node dist/cli.js status against sandbox loaded clean — no import-time crash from the new module
will rm -rf ~/cortextos-sandbox + ~/.cortextos/pr-sandbox after result write

Spread of result.meta moved before named bookkeeping keys at hooks.ts:266 (exactly as recommended)

727/727 tests pass (was 726, +1 regression)
